case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. JOE ALMENDAREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT ALMENDAREZ, JOE DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-08-2019
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 65604639) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $258.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 65604639) AS TO DEFENDANT ALMENDAREZ, JOE
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65604639) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT (TRANSACTION ID # 65604639) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALMENDAREZ, JOE $2,571.08 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,830.03, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100046830), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED MAY-07-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAY-10-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT ALMENDAREZ, JOE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2020 CONTINUED TO AUG-18-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-18-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
